entries.review:
The review renderer should keep file locations readable without widening the transcript.

Full review comments:

- [P3] Keep linked directory paths compact — /Users/huntharo/work/PwrAgent/apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/composer/Composer.tsx:2013-2014
  Paths inside the thread directory should render relative to that directory and keep the full absolute target in the link destination.

- [P0] Wrap external review file paths — /Volumes/ExternalReviewArchive/OutsideRepositoryPathWithAnExcessivelyLongSingleFilenameSegmentThatMustWrapInsideTheReviewRendererBecauseItCannotBeReducedByTheCurrentWorkingDirectoryBoundary.tsx:88-91
  Paths outside the current working directory cannot be shortened by prefix stripping, so the location row must wrap the long linked filename instead of overflowing horizontally.
